regional_cost_note: Heat pump installers in Palmerston North typically charge $2,600–$4,800 for a single-room unit (supply and install) and $8,500–$20,000 for a multi-split system. Manawatū rates are typically 5–10% below the national average. Get at least 3 quotes — brand, capacity, and installation complexity vary widely and significantly affect the price.
